generator.method: Go AST over JSON-tagged structs plus reviewed RawMessage unions and policy overlays

includes: client outbounds and account settings registered by LibXray
RAW, WebSocket, gRPC, HTTPUpgrade, XHTTP, mKCP, and Hysteria transports
TLS, REALITY, FinalMask, mux, socket options, DNS, FakeDNS, routing, policy, balancing, observatory, version, and local geodata
excludes: custom server inbounds (the TUN inbound is generated and owned by Hop)
API and metrics listeners, reverse proxy, server-only transport/security fields
deprecated global transport settings and upstream removed features

notes: Authentication and QUIC controls are in streamSettings.hysteriaSettings.
Includes Xray's registered Shadowsocks and SS2022 client config shape; Hop enforces the pinned secure cipher allowlist.
encryption is preserved as the pinned VLESS Encryption/Auth grammar, including mlkem768x25519plus.
Hop forces noKernelTun=true.
Applies when the parent outbound protocol is http.
Routing rules are RawMessage entries parsed as field rules; inherited RouterRule target fields also apply.
Applies when the parent outbound protocol is socks.
extra is reparsed as SplitHTTPConfig; outer host, path, and mode remain authoritative.
Xray accepts documented spelling aliases case-insensitively.
Shape is defined by FakeDNSConfig.UnmarshalJSON rather than exported struct fields.
users entries use HTTPAccount fields.
Xray accepts documented spelling aliases case-insensitively.
NameServerConfig.UnmarshalJSON accepts either an address string or the expanded object fields.
Function-local struct used by parseFieldRule; inherited RouterRule fields are valid JSON fields.
Comparison is case-insensitive; unknown values fall back to AsIs.
The enum records values parsed by the pinned core and pinned SS2022 dependency; Hop rejects none/plain and applies its reviewed secure allowlist.
users entries use SocksAccount fields.
h2, h3, http, and quic are parsed only to return a removed-feature error.
xtls is parsed only to return a removed-feature error.
users entries are Xray VLESS account JSON; Hop accepts the flat client fields and preserves reviewed long-tail settings.
Hop policy permits only auto, aes-128-gcm, and chacha20-poly1305.
Hop policy permits only auto, aes-128-gcm, and chacha20-poly1305.
users entries use VMessAccount fields.

rejectedPaths.reason: API listeners are outside Hop's client schema.
Asset paths must resolve to a Hop-verified local asset.
Hop permits only verified local geodata; runtime asset downloads are forbidden.
Arbitrary listeners are forbidden; Hop generates exactly one TUN inbound.
The core may not write arbitrary files; extension logging is bounded and sanitized.
The core may not write arbitrary files; extension logging is bounded and sanitized.
Metrics listeners are outside Hop's client schema.
VLESS reverse proxy is outside Hop's client schema.
Hysteria server masquerade settings are outside client schema.
The pinned core removed legacy mKCP headers; use FinalMask instead.
The pinned core removed legacy mKCP seed obfuscation; use FinalMask instead.
REALITY master-key logging is forbidden.
Server-only REALITY fields are forbidden.
Arbitrary platform socket options are unsafe and unavailable on iOS.
Removed by Xray v26.6.27 and forbidden by Hop policy.
Unverified external file reads are forbidden.
Unverified external file reads and key files are forbidden.
TLS master-key logging is forbidden.
Runtime traffic telemetry is not part of Hop's client schema.
Runtime traffic telemetry is not part of Hop's client schema.
Runtime traffic telemetry is not part of Hop's client schema.
Xray system policy contains only runtime traffic telemetry flags, which Hop does not expose.
Reverse proxy is outside Hop's client schema.
Per-process routing cannot be reproduced by Hop's iOS packet tunnel.
Unsupported network probes and callbacks are forbidden.
Runtime traffic telemetry is not part of Hop's client schema.
Deprecated global transport configuration is rejected by the pinned core.
